After 23 days of async_prep deployment with zero operator engagement, synthesized adoption barrier pattern — unengaged tools are not failures but friction data points. key_learnings: Terminal-native curses cannot daemonize without SSH/session management; requires interactive TTY
Web-based ambient indicators solve persistence problem but add discoverability friction (must navigate to URL)
Async_prep's zero engagement over 23 days = structural friction signal, not tool failure
